changeSet.author: cv-processor
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;

changeSet.author: cv-processor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = 'admin@admin.com'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, full_name, enabled, locked, failed_login_attempts, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( 'admin@admin.com', crypt('Admin@12345', gen_salt('bf')), 'Default Admin', true, false, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );

changeSet.author: cv-processor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = 'hr@hr.com'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, full_name, enabled, locked, failed_login_attempts, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( 'hr@hr.com', crypt('Hr@12345', gen_salt('bf')), 'Default HR', true, false, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );

changeSet.author: cv-processor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_roles ur JOIN users u ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.email = 'admin@admin.com' AND r.name = 'HR'

changeSet.author: cv-processor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_roles ur JOIN users u ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.email = 'hr@hr.com' AND r.name = 'HR'
